title: Basic SR Latch Operation
description: A flowchart illustrating the fundamental operation and state changes of a basic Set-Reset (SR) latch built with NOR gates.
relationships: S and R inputs control the state of Q and Q̅
A 'high' (1) on S sets Q to 1
A 'high' (1) on R resets Q to 0
S and R should not be 'high' simultaneously (invalid state)
